detaileddescription.para: You can refer to the below stated example applications for more details on how to use bram driver.

sect1.title: xbram_example.c
sect1.para: Contains an example on how to use the XBram driver directly. This example performs the basic selftest using the bram driver.

sect1.title: xbram_intr_example.c
sect1.para: Contains an example on how to use the XBram driver directly. This example shows the usage of driver in interrupt mode.
